channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nike Promo Codes and Discounts: 30% for May 2026
item.description: Check out our deals for Nike this month, including 15% off select purchases.

item.title: Google Workspace Promo Codes: 14% Off for May
item.description: Boost your productivity and save with exclusive Google Workspace coupons from WIRED. Get up to 14% off plans for three months, including Starter, Standard, and Plus tiers.

item.title: Chewy Promo Codes: $20 Off May 2026
item.description: Explore Chewy coupon codes for $30 off, $20 off your first order $49, 50% off pet food, and more May 2026 discounts.

item.title: Peacock Promo Codes: 40% Off May 2026
item.description: Stream your favorite shows for up to $80 off this month, and save on subscription plans with the latest Peacock TV coupons from WIRED.

item.title: 30% Off Samsung Promo Code | May 2026
item.description: Save 30% or 10% with Samsung coupon codes, up to $1,000 on appliances, plus limited-time deals on the Galaxy Z Fold7, Flip7, and S25.

item.title: AT&T Promo Codes: $50 Off This May 2026
item.description: Whether you’re looking to upgrade your internet or get the latest phone, we’ve got you covered with our selection of AT&T coupons and deals.

item.title: Dyson Promo Codes: 25% Off in May 2026
item.description: Get 25% off with a Dyson coupon code, plus save up to $600 with discounts on vacuums, $150 off Airwraps, and more.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for May 22, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on May 22
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for May 22, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.
